title: Boma (species)
content:
{{Top|ncl}}
{{Otheruses|Boma}}
{{Cut|canon=1|Star Wars drafts}}
'''Bomas''' were large [[Sentience|sentient]] species, standing at about five feet tall, and covered with brown fur. They did not speak [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]].

The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] named a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] group which attacked the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]] "Boma" flight.

==Behind the scenes==
Boma are described as being a "cross between a brown bear and a guinea pig."

In the [[The Star Wars first draft|first draft]] to [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|Episode IV]], [[George Lucas]] created the name Boma as a possible replacement name for [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]]. For the second draft, however, a Boma named [[Oeeta]] shared an apartment with [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]].<ref name="Star Wars Insider 95">[[Star Wars Insider 95|''Star Wars Insider'' 95]]</ref>

"[[Boma]] beasts" appeared in the [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi (comic series)|''Tales of the Jedi'']] comic series and ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' as dangerous non-sentient creatures on [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]] and its [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Dxun/Legends|Dxun]]. It is unclear whether the name of that species (who do not resemble the sentient Boma) was an homage to [[George Lucas|Lucas]]' draft scripts.
